hooks.description: Suggest shipping when implementation work is complete
hooks.prompt: Review the conversation. If the user just completed a code implementation task (wrote code, fixed a bug, added a feature) and there are uncommitted changes, respond with exactly 'SUGGEST_SHIP'. If the work is incomplete, exploratory, or already committed, respond with 'NO_ACTION'.

hooks.description: Check for in-progress implementation plans on session start
hooks.prompt: Check if IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md exists in the repository root. If it exists, check if any items have Status: IN_PROGRESS or if there are PENDING items after COMPLETE items (indicating a partially-executed plan). If a plan is in progress, respond with 'PLAN_IN_PROGRESS'. Otherwise respond with 'NO_ACTION'.
